svg.title: 5 parts of a JavaScript function labeled
svg.desc: Shows function keyword, name, parameters, body, and return statement with color coded labels and explanations

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the function keyword do?')
sendPrompt('How should I name functions in JavaScript?')
sendPrompt('What are parameters in a function?')
sendPrompt('What goes inside the function body?')
sendPrompt('What does return do in a function?')
sendPrompt('How do I call a function in JavaScript?')
